case_title: ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES VS MANRIQUEZ PATRICIA A

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $927.00 FILED BY ITT FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MANRIQUEZ PATRICIA A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-14-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MANRIQUEZ PATRICIA A
